title: polygala brevifolia
intro: Polygala brevifolia, also known as Shortleaf Polygala, is a flowering plant native to North America. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Polygala brevifolia is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
